heading: Establishment of Saint Helena Island National Scenic Area, Michigan
label: 546 Establishment of Saint Helena Island National Scenic Area, Michigan
notes: References in TextSection 1001 of the Coast Guard Authorization Act of 1996, referred to in subsec. (c), is , title X, , , which is not classified to the Code.section 1001 of Pub. L. 104–324110 Stat. 3948Oct. 19, 1996

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–431, § 1114 Stat. 1905Nov. 6, 2000“This Act [enacting sections 546 to 546a–5 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Saint Helena Island National Scenic Area Act’.”
amendments: References in TextSection 1001 of the Coast Guard Authorization Act of 1996, referred to in subsec. (c), is , title X, , , which is not classified to the Code.section 1001 of Pub. L. 104–324110 Stat. 3948Oct. 19, 1996

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–431, § 1114 Stat. 1905Nov. 6, 2000“This Act [enacting sections 546 to 546a–5 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Saint Helena Island National Scenic Area Act’.”

children.text: to preserve and protect for present and future generations the outstanding resources and values of Saint Helena Island in Lake Michigan, Michigan; and
to provide for the conservation, protection, and enhancement of primitive recreation opportunities, fish and wildlife habitat, vegetation, and historical and cultural resources of the island.

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: b Establishment
children.text: For the purposes described in subsection (a), there shall be established the Saint Helena Island National Scenic Area (in sections 546 to 546a–5 of this title referred to as the “scenic area”).

children.heading: Effective upon conveyance
children.label: c Effective upon conveyance
children.text: Subsection (b) shall be effective upon conveyance of satisfactory title to the United States of the whole of Saint Helena Island, except that portion conveyed to the Great Lakes Lighthouse Keepers Association pursuant to section 1001 of the Coast Guard Authorization Act of 1996 (; ).Public Law 104–324110 Stat. 3948
